data.title: Forward Water Technologies Corp. Announces Auditor Change
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Forward Water Technologies Corp ( (TSE:FWTC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Forward Water Technologies Corp. has announced a change in its auditing firm, transitioning from RSM Canada LLP to Forbes Anderson LLP as of May 22, 2025. This change in auditors is a significant step for the company, potentially impacting its financial reporting and compliance processes, which could influence stakeholder confidence and the company’s strategic positioning in the water technology industry.

More about Forward Water Technologies Corp

Forward Water Technologies Corp. is a Canadian company focused on conserving water resources through its patented Forward Osmosis technology. The company aims to implement its technology across various sectors, including industrial wastewater, oil and gas, mining, agriculture, and municipal water supply, while also exploring applications in food and beverage processing.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$2.28M

data.title: Eat & Beyond Completes Strategic Acquisition of Milo Media
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Eat & Beyond Global Holdings ( (TSE:EATS) ) has provided an announcement.

Eat & Beyond Global Holdings Inc. has announced the filing of a Business Acquisition Report for its acquisition of Milo Media Technologies Inc., now known as Liquidlink AI Corp. The acquisition involved issuing 15 million common shares and 15 million share purchase warrants to Milo shareholders. This strategic move enhances Eat & Beyond’s position in the blockchain technology sector, focusing on asset tokenization and decentralized infrastructure, potentially impacting its market presence and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Eat & Beyond Global Holdings

Eat & Beyond Global Holdings Inc. is a publicly traded investment issuer that focuses on equity investments in global companies developing innovative food tech, sustainability, and technology solutions. The company provides retail investors with opportunities in alternative food, sustainability, and technology sectors, and has recently entered the blockchain technology sector through its subsidiary Liquidlink AI Corp.

data.title: Greenway Technologies Adopts Amended Bylaws for Governance
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Greenway Technologies ( (GWTI) ).

On May 20, 2025, Greenway Technologies entered into a term sheet with Renewable Elements, LLC to install a G-ReformerTM pilot site for producing synthesis and hydrogen gas. Renewable Elements paid a non-refundable deposit of $1,300,000, which Greenway Technologies plans to use for research and development and the construction of the pilot site. Additionally, on May 22, 2025, the company adopted amended bylaws to align with recent corporate governance practices and SEC regulations, including changes to shareholder voting rights and director election procedures. Furthermore, Greenway Technologies’ common stock is set to transition to the OTCID Basic Market effective July 1, 2025, as part of its ongoing evaluation of trading platforms to benefit shareholders.

More about Greenway Technologies

Greenway Technologies, Inc. operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on the development and commercialization of technologies to produce synthesis and hydrogen gas. The company is engaged in creating pilot sites for their G-ReformerTM technology, which aims to enhance the production of clean energy.

Average Trading Volume: 91,253

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Portland GE ( (POR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On May 23, 2025, Portland General Electric Company (PGE) announced its intention to reorganize into a holding company structure, as filed with the Oregon Public Utilities Commission. This reorganization aims to enhance strategic and financial flexibility, support new transmission asset construction, and maintain shareholder value, with PGE becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of the new holding company upon completion.

The most recent analyst rating on (POR) stock is a Buy with a $51.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Portland GE stock, see the POR Stock Forecast page.

While technical analysis indicates some bearish sentiment, the company’s strong revenue growth and solid dividend yield offer significant strengths. However, the increase in leverage and challenges in managing operating expenses present notable risks.

Portland General Electric Company (PGE) operates in the energy industry, focusing on electricity generation and distribution. The company primarily serves customers in Oregon and is involved in the development and management of transmission assets.

The latest update is out from QcX Gold ( (TSE:QCX) ).

QcX Gold Corp. has announced a share consolidation, reducing its outstanding common shares from approximately 75.9 million to 7.6 million, subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval. This move aims to streamline the company’s share structure, potentially enhancing market perception and shareholder value as it continues its exploration activities in promising regions of Québec.

More about QcX Gold

QcX Gold is a company focused on exploring for gold and VMS style mineralization in Québec, Canada. Their key projects include the Golden Giant Project in the James Bay region and the Fernet Project in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt, both strategically located near major discoveries.

Everi Holdings ( (EVRI) ) has issued an update.

On May 21, 2025, Everi Holdings Inc. held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders where several key proposals were voted on. Stockholders re-elected Geoffrey P. Judge, Michael D. Rumbolz, and Debra L. Nutton as Class II directors to serve until the 2028 annual meeting. Additionally, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers was approved on an advisory non-binding basis, and PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP was ratified as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025.

Continued focus on reducing debt and improving profitability is essential for enhancing investor confidence.

data.title: Almaden Minerals Announces Key Persons Retention Agreement Amid Arbitration Proceedings
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Almaden Minerals ( (TSE:AMM) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 23, 2025, Almaden Minerals Ltd. announced the establishment of a Key Persons Retention Agreement (KPA) to retain essential personnel for its ongoing international arbitration proceedings with Mexico. This agreement aims to ensure the active participation of key individuals who possess critical historical knowledge relevant to the arbitration claim. If successful, the KPA will allocate 4% of the net proceeds from any damages awarded to these key personnel, with a cap of US$12 million. The agreement will be presented for shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General and Special Meeting on June 26, 2025. The financial terms of the KPA have been reviewed and deemed fair by Evans & Evans, Inc., a third-party financial advisory firm.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AMM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AMM is a Neutral.

Almaden Minerals faces significant challenges, including financial instability due to lack of revenue and high leverage. Legal disputes with Mexico further cloud its prospects. However, technical indicators show some positive momentum in the short term. Valuation concerns persist with a negative P/E ratio and no dividends.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AMM stock, click here.

More about Almaden Minerals

Almaden Minerals Ltd. is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on mineral exploration and development. The company is involved in international arbitration proceedings under the Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership with the United Mexican States.

Average Trading Volume: 74,437

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Biofrontera ( (BFRI) ) is now available.

On May 21, 2025, Biofrontera Inc. received a notice from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with the equity listing requirement, as their stockholders’ equity was reported at $469,000, below the required $2,500,000. The company has 45 days to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq, and if accepted, they may have up to 180 days to meet the requirements, with the possibility of appealing if the plan is rejected.

The most recent analyst rating on (BFRI) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Biofrontera stock, see the BFRI Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BFRI is a Neutral.

Biofrontera’s overall stock score reflects the company’s revenue growth and strategic milestones, but it is heavily weighed down by ongoing unprofitability, high leverage, and weak technical indicators. The Nasdaq non-compliance notice adds further risk to the stock’s stability.

To see Spark’s full report on BFRI stock, click here.

More about Biofrontera

Biofrontera Inc. operates in the biopharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of dermatological products.
